chunks.description: This transcript segment appears to be from an **English language learning lesson focusing on subject-verb agreement and demonstrative adjectives** (e.g., correcting errors like "shirts is" and practicing descriptions of clothing items).

chunks.description: Students practice talking about birthdays, including birth months and using prepositions like "in" and "on" with months and dates.
